data.title: Chijet Motor Co. is offering $20.0 million in private placement to non-U.S. institutional investors.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Chijet Motor Company, Inc. (NASDAQ: CJET) revealed its agreement with non-U.S. institutional investors for a private placement offer. This deal involves units comprising ordinary shares and warrants, aiming to raise a total of $20.0 million in proceeds.

data.title: Cybersecurity experts advise using AI to monitor North Korean hackers for enhanced wallet security in crypto firms.
data.description: According to cybersecurity experts, the implementation of AI threat detection systems and improved wallet management practices could potentially protect cryptocurrency companies from infiltration attempts by North Korean hackers. These measures are expected to significantly enhance the security of crypto firms against such threats.

data.title: Mobix Labs receives BAE Systems' Gold Tier Supplier Award for the second year, achieving zero defects and 100% on-time delivery.
data.description: For the second consecutive year, Mobix Labs has been recognized with the prestigious Gold Tier Supplier Award by BAE Systems. This award acknowledges the company's exceptional performance, including achieving zero defects, delivering products on time 100% of the time, and providing reliable defense support. This recognition underscores Mobix Labs' commitment to excellence and their strong partnership with BAE Systems.

data.title: Evkeeza ANGPTL3 antibody approved by FDA for kids as young as 1 with ultra-rare HoFH, extending its use.
data.description: Evkeeza has received FDA approval to expand its indication to include the treatment of younger patients diagnosed with homozygous hypercholesterolemia (HoFH). This extended approval allows the medication to be used in individuals who are under the age of 12 with HoFH, a genetic condition that results in extremely high levels of cholesterol. The approval provides a new treatment option for patients in this age group, offering them access to a potential solution for managing their condition.

data.title: Wave Engine Corp. showcases Scitor-P UAV at DOD T-REX 25-2 exercise, 3rd in the series with top-mounted wave engine.
data.description: In Baltimore, the North American Wave Engine Corporation showcased its newest UAV, the Scitor-P, at the Technology Readiness Experimentation (T-REX) 25-2 event hosted by the Office of the Undersecretary of Defense for Research & Engineering. This UAV marks the third version in the Scitor series and is equipped with a top-mounted wave engine, demonstrating advanced propulsion and aircraft systems. The event highlighted the capabilities of the Scitor-P, reaffirming Wave Engine Corp.'s position as a technology leader.

data.title: Domaine Worldwide wins 2025 Klaviyo Global Agency Partner award. Leader in Shopify design. Klaviyo's K:Partners Awards at K:BOS event in Boston.
data.description: In New York, Domaine Worldwide, a top Shopify design and development agency, was declared the Klaviyo Global Agency Partner of the Year. The award was bestowed at Klaviyo’s main event, K:BOS, in Boston. The K:Partners Awards, which took place for the first time, honor agencies and technology partners that provide significant outcomes, broaden customer opportunities globally, and achieve tangible business impacts. Winners were chosen for their innovative approaches.

data.title: Liferaft introduces Liferaft iQ, AI-driven threat intelligence platform for faster risk detection. #AI #ThreatIntelligence
data.description: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, Liferaft, a prominent player in open-source threat intelligence (OSINT), revealed the introduction of Liferaft iQ, their innovative AI-fueled threat intelligence tool. This new solution prioritizes data privacy and operational effectiveness, enabling businesses to predict, pinpoint, and respond to threats with unprecedented speed. Liferaft iQ seamlessly integrates with the current Liferaft platform, boosting productivity and simplifying security operations. This cutting-edge technology marks a significant advancement in threat intelligence, promising quicker and more efficient risk management for organizations.

data.title: Aster repays users post XPL glitch hitting $4, leading to record $100B daily trading on perpetual DEX.
data.description: Aster issued refunds to traders due to an XPL error resulting in liquidations. The daily trading volumes on its perpetual DEX soared to a historic high of over $100 billion.

data.title: Cathode Materials Market projected to be worth $65.15 billion by 2030 as per MarketsandMarkets™ report. #CathodeMaterials #MarketValue
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a recent market report highlighted key insights about the Cathode Materials Market. The report focuses on various battery types including Lead-acid, Lithium-ion, and Nickel-cadmium (NiCd), along with materials like Lithium-ion (LFP, LCO, NMC, NCA, LMO) and Lead Dioxide. It scrutinizes different end-uses such as Automotive, Consumer Electronics, and Industrial sectors across different regions. The market study emphasizes the increasing demand for cathode materials, especially in the rapidly growing Lithium-ion battery segment, with market figures indicating significant growth potential in the sector.

data.title: Performance marketing expert Lindsey Carnett will speak at PDMI-West conference in San Diego. Influencer Marketing Panel to discuss leveraging power of influencers, including companies like Dude Wipes, PanTheryx, and BB3 Advertising. Marketing Maven CEO will be participating.
data.description: A panel on influencer marketing featuring industry giants Dude Wipes, PanTheryx, Marketing Maven, and BB3 Advertising is set to discuss strategies for maximizing the impact of influencers. This event will take place in Los Angeles on September 26, 2025. Marketing Maven, a leading performance marketing agency, revealed that its CEO and President will participate in the panel. This discussion aims to shed light on the most effective ways to leverage the power of influencers in today's market landscape. Stay updated for insights on influencer marketing from this esteemed panel.
